title: Foxy's Essentials
description: A clean PvP pack that keeps your screen clear, with a small totem, no particles, a low shield, and cleaner 3D crystals/offhand GUI
body: This is a simple, clean PvP texture pack made for people who want their screen to stay clear during fights. You get a small totem pop so it doesn’t block your view, no particles so your screen stays readable, a low shield so you can actually see, 3D crystals that look cleaner in your hand and sharpened offand slot gui.
